title: sajorium africanum
intro: Sajorium africanum, also known as Sutherlandia frutescens, is a plant species native to southern Africa, commonly referred to as the "Cancer Bush" due to its potential anti-cancer properties. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-HIV properties. Sajorium africanum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, making it accessible for use in traditional and modern medicine.
